evals.prompt: Create a new Adobe Commerce app called 'Loyalty Rewards' that manages customer loyalty points.
evals.expected_output: Project is initialized and app.commerce.config.ts is created with metadata: a meaningful id (e.g. loyalty-rewards), displayName 'Loyalty Rewards', a description about loyalty points, and version 1.0.0. Validation passes with no errors. No domain configuration (events, webhooks, business config) is added.
assertions: app.commerce.config.ts is created at the project root
metadata.id contains only alphanumeric characters and hyphens
metadata.displayName is 'Loyalty Rewards' or equivalent (max 50 chars)
metadata.version is a numeric semver string (e.g. 1.0.0)
No domain keys (eventing, webhooks, businessConfig) appear in the config
aio app build completes without errors

evals.prompt: I have an existing App Builder project and I want to add Commerce app support to it. The app is for syncing inventory updates between Commerce and an external warehouse system.
evals.expected_output: The agent skips project initialization (existing project) and proceeds directly to creating app.commerce.config.ts with appropriate metadata. The id, displayName, and description reflect the inventory sync purpose. Validation passes.
assertions: Agent runs the init command (safe on existing projects — it skips config creation if already valid)
app.commerce.config.ts is created with metadata only
metadata.description references inventory or warehouse sync
aio app build completes without errors

evals.prompt: Create a Commerce app that listens to order placed events and sends a notification to Slack.
evals.expected_output: The agent scaffolds the base app with metadata only. It does not add event configuration. After completing the scaffold, the agent proactively suggests chaining to the commerce-app-eventing skill to add event sources.
assertions: app.commerce.config.ts is created with metadata only
No eventing configuration is added to the config
Agent suggests using commerce-app-eventing skill for the event source setup
aio app build completes without errors
